recommendation: ALERT REQUIRED. Multiple codes found this week vs last week's clean scan. Most significant: FLASH30 (30% off) was newly added to HotDeals 2 days ago and SUMMER30 (30% off) has 6 uses. Both SAVE5 and WELCOME5 (the known watch codes) are publicly listed on HotDeals and Knoji — Knoji marks them as likely expired but HotDeals claims active usage. Mitch should log into Shopify and check which of these codes are currently active/enabled, then deactivate any that shouldn't be public. Priority order: FLASH30, SUMMER30, MOM20, SAVE5, WELCOME5, then the 15% codes.
